decks.notes: This deck focuses on creating a fast and aggressive board presence by playing low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, while also utilizing efficient combat tricks such as Mightform Harmonizer and Sazh's Chocobo. The deck includes some powerful late-game threats like Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Mossborn Hydra to ensure it can close out games quickly. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive strategy with a mix of green and white sources, as well as include utility lands like Escape Tunnel and Hushwood Verge for additional flexibility.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. By using cards like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board, coupled with aggressive creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The deck also includes cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand to help filter through the deck and find key pieces. With a mix of efficient creatures and spells, this deck aims to pressure the opponent and maintain board control throughout the game.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using a combination of creatures and spells. By utilizing creatures like Bloodghast and Marauding Mako, along with spells such as Burst Lightning and Erode, the deck aims to maintain board presence and deal damage quickly. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Tersa Lightshatter and Cool but Rude provide utility and disruption to gain an advantage over the opponent. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy by providing the right colors of mana efficiently.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Pawpatch Recruit, supported by ramp from Llanowar Elves and utility from Keen-Eyed Curator. The strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of creatures while utilizing cards like Seam Rip and Brightglass Gearhulk for removal and protection. The inclusion of Ouroboroid and Gene Pollinator adds resilience and consistency to the deck, allowing for continuous pressure on the opponent. The mana base is optimized for smooth curve progression and efficient color fixing to ensure a fast and powerful assault.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of low-cost creatures and instant spells to apply pressure on the opponent quickly and consistently. By playing efficient threats such as Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, along with a mix of burn spells like Burst Lightning and card draw/filtering spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand, the deck aims to maintain a high tempo and keep the opposing player on the back foot. The inclusion of evasion abilities and disruptive elements like Secret Identity and Impractical Joke further enhances the aggro strategy.

This deck focuses on utilizing the card Omniscience to cast multiple spells for free each turn, aiming to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures and spells. The deck includes various creatures with powerful abilities that synergize well with Omniscience, such as Ashling, Rekindled and Marang River Regent. The deck also includes a mix of control spells, card draw, and protection to help maintain board advantage and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The overall goal is to assemble the necessary pieces to create a powerful board state and secure victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing fast and efficient creatures to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By using cards like Badgermole Cub, Sazh's Chocobo, and Mightform Harmonizer, the deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on. The inclusion of Erode and Earthbender Ascension allows for removal and additional damage output. The deck also has some control elements with cards like Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Royal Treatment. Overall, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent and finish the game quickly through aggressive plays and efficient creatures.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly swarm the board with low-cost creatures and use support cards like Earthbender Ascension and Felidar Retreat to pump them up and overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes some removal spells like Erode to deal with threats on the opposing side of the battlefield. The mana base is optimized for consistency and includes various ways to search for specific lands. The strategy focuses on aggressive plays and leveraging the synergy between the creatures and enchantments in the deck to secure a victory.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells. It aims to maintain card advantage through Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation, while also controlling the board with cards like Burst Lightning and Lightning Helix. Inevitable Defeat and Consult the Star Charts help to manipulate the opponent's resources, while Stock Up provides additional card draw. The deck also includes versatile removal options like Sear and Erode, along with board wipes such as Day of Judgment and Pyroclasm. The mana base is designed to support the deck's color requirements while also providing flexibility in casting spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Azorius colors to create an aggressive strategy through a mix of creatures and spells. Aang, as the centerpiece, provides support and protection for other creatures like Aven Interrupter and Floodpits Drowner, while also enabling powerful attacks with cards like Avatar's Wrath. The deck also includes control elements like Spell Snare and Get Lost to disrupt opponents. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the strategy with a mix of lands to ensure consistent casting of spells and creatures.

This deck focuses on utilizing flying creatures and buffing them with various spells and abilities to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The key strategy is to swarm the board with flying creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, while using cards like Starfield Shepherd and Cosmogrand Zenith to boost their power. Additionally, cards like Quantum Riddler and Haliya, Guided by Light provide extra utility and control options. The deck also includes ramp and fixing with Floodfarm Verge and Hallowed Fountain to ensure consistent mana access for powerful plays.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with quick and efficient creatures and spells, creating a fast-paced and aggressive playstyle. The deck aims to control the board early on with low-cost spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, while using Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to apply pressure. The inclusion of bounce and counter spells like Bounce Off and Spell Pierce helps to maintain tempo and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also utilizes cards like Boomerang Basics and Sleight of Hand to draw additional resources and keep up the pressure.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of cheap, efficient creatures and burn spells. The goal is to maintain control of the board while dealing direct damage to the opponent, utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent to apply pressure. The deck also includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics to disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of tempo plays and aggressive creatures, this deck aims to close out the game in the early turns before the opponent can establish their own game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures onto the battlefield while supporting them with efficient spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By combining quick tempo plays like Burst Lightning and Sleight of Hand with evasive threats like Slickshot Show-Off and Colorstorm Stallion, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own board presence. Additionally, the deck includes versatile spells like Opt and Spell Pierce to provide card selection and counterplay options, ensuring flexibility in various matchups.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to apply pressure on the opponent. By playing aggressively and efficiently, the aim is to control the board and deal damage quickly. Cards such as Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent help in dealing direct damage, while Slickshot Show-Off and Valley Floodcaller provide consistent threats. The mana base is built to support the fast-paced playstyle, allowing for maximum efficiency in casting spells. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly establishing a strong board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Ouroboroid. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and combat tricks like Seam Rip and Meltstrider's Resolve. The inclusion of cards like Gene Pollinator and Brightglass Gearhulk provide additional value and resilience to the deck. Overall, the strategy revolves around maintaining pressure on the opponent and quickly closing out the game before they can stabilize.
